Strip_Summary: Two stickmen at cafe table in Dubai. SUBJECT with newspaper. FACELESS asset with tea.
Sending him back. Cafe in Dubai. Cardamom and exhaust air.
SUBJECT reading finished newspaper. Coffee untouched. Not here for coffee.
Fourteen months of promise. Promises do not expire. They get heavier.
Satellite imagery of Iran. Never walked those streets. Buildings known from space.
FACELESS asset ordering tea. Checking watch. Sliding phone face-down.
Dozens of times. Cities not supposed to remember. Names never used.
Bold text on dark background: 'You are a ghost. You don't pull the trigger. But you choose who goes back.'
Training facility - the Farm. Learning to disappear. Not fight not shoot.
SUBJECT building forgettable face. Walking into rooms unnoticed.
FACELESS instructors calm as weather. Building burns behind them.
Graduation. Forty-minute conversation. Forgets eye color.
That is the point. Best officer nobody notices.
Walking through life leaving no trace.
Gulf city tower. Heat off the plane. Office like consulting firm.
Fake brochures. Steel door no handle. Where he actually works.
Windowless SCIF full of screens. MICE formula. Money Ideology Compromise Ego.
Four cracks in loyalty wall. Finding one. Pressing it open.
First FACELESS telecom engineer. Always tea never coffee. Watch every two minutes.
Nervous habit or calculating escape. Same grey jacket every meeting.
Trained to notice. Six months before first ask. Riding elevators together.
Sitting in lobbies. Small talk. Tea not wanted. Learning which questions work.
Which questions make him look at door. Building trust. But is not trust.
Walk through souk. Forty minutes reading newspaper. SUBJECT watching.
Same man passes twice. Different shirt same shoes. Could be nothing.
Trained to notice. Trained to doubt. Counter-surveillance paranoia.
SUBJECT across from asset. Fifteen minutes. Talk listen nod laugh.
Asset leaves first. Waits nine minutes. Out the back. No tail. Nothing.
That is how you know something is wrong. Nothing is never nothing.
Bold text on dark background: 'You don't kill anyone. You just convince them to go back.'
War starts. Everything changes. New young officers at station.
Results in weeks not years. More sources cables production.
Word production in every memo. People manufactured.
Vetting cut six months to three weeks. Nobody writes reason.
Told temporary. It is not.
CI email about unreported meeting. Does not remember telling anyone.
Or does not remember not telling. Checking notes. Calendar.
Checking access log. Not sure anymore. Maybe told someone.
Managing lies so long cannot find truth.
Recruiting new FACELESS asset. Mid-level officer. Volunteers eagerly.
Should be cautious. Three weeks vetting. Not enough.
Station chief signs off. Filing cable. Production matters.
Safe house. FACELESS asset about daughter learning to read.
Voice changes with pride. SUBJECT tells about his - legend.
Fabricated detail. Practiced in mirror. Got inflection right.
Slight smile rehearsed. His daughter real. SUBJECT daughter technique.
Smiles back. Not technique. Or maybe it is. Cannot tell anymore.
Cable to Langley. Not a person. A cryptonym. He is production.
Briefing room. FACELESS CI officer in corner. Notes unseen.
Meeting six months ago. Details too accurate.
Someone at HQ knows detail they should not. Access list too long.
Cannot sleep. Counter-surveillance off duty. Checking mirrors in malls.
Checking own phone at angles. Looking for things he planted.
Bold text on dark background: 'You are not just watching others. You are being watched.'
Channel lights up. Two words: They know. Reply nothing. Days pass.
Checking channel every morning. Before coffee. For months.
Grey jacket. Tea always ordered. Watch always checked. Gone.
Intelligence to military planners. Strike authorized.
Manila folder classification stamp. BDA on desk. Opens assessment.
Zooming in on image. Not a facility. People. No code names.
Information accurate. Targeting not his. Coordinates were. Closing folder.
Folder in safe. Back to desk. Another cable. Cannot un-provide coordinates.
Asset compromised. Promised to get him out.
If it comes to this we get you out. Filing request.
Committee takes a week. He does not have. Asset does not have.
Not at this time. Daughter same age. Cannot warn. Cannot resign.
Resigning means questions exposure disappearances. People who trusted.
New FACELESS asset. Tea watch same habits. Different face. Info too clean.
Too exactly what HQ wants. Gut says wrong.
Cannot prove negative. Filing cable. Career depends on production.
Alternative is admitting he does not know.
Network collapses. Eleven names on screen. Windowless room.
Fluorescent light buzzing. Recognizing three. One always ordered tea.
Bold text on dark background: 'And never finished it.'
Suburban Virginia. Split-level house. Normal. Nobody has clearance.
Daughter drawings on fridge. Crayon sun. Stick figures holding hands.
Counting four figures on drawing. House no secrets. Except there are.
Encrypted phone in jacket. Coat rack. Checking under dinner table.
Wife clearing plates. Daughter talking about day.
Does not catch friend name. Reading message under table. No one sees.
Kitchen. FACELESS daughter looking up. Crayon on fingers.
Says yes. Most honest lie. Not sure answer still true.
Not sure ever true. Daughter smiles. Goes back to drawing.
Watching daughter draw stick figures. Wondering if one is him.
Knows what happened. Reports differ. Ceasefire on TV.
Wife good news. Does not move. Thinking about grey jacket.
Man checking watch. Tea too cold. Too nervous to drink.
Wondering if finished last cup. If daughter learned to read.
Wondering if she knows. Or told he went for work.
Same way he tells his own daughter.
Bold text on dark background: 'You help. You also betray. At the same time. The same person.'
Same cafe as HOOK. Same table newspaper cardamom. Empty chair.
Bold text: 'There is no tea on the table.' Absence louder than anything.
Phone vibrates. Unknown signal. After months of nothing.
Does not open it. Bold text: 'It doesn't end. There's just no one left to order tea.'
